details: Confirmed UAS track T-001. Visual and RF corroboration.
Reacquired visual contact. UAS loitering NE. Bearing 050.
SALUTE report submitted: Size-SMALL, Activity-ISR, Location-NE 34.0536/-118.2419, Unit-UNK, Time-1406, Equipment-GROUP1_QUAD
Track T-001 cleared. UAS departed east. After-action logged.
Dismissed T-002 as false alarm. No RF. Biological flight pattern. Likely large bird.
FLASH: 3x UAS swarm detected N. Escalating to command. Requesting C-UAS support.
Increased all sensor sensitivity to MAX. Expanded detection radius.
FLASH report submitted for swarm event. 3x Group 1 UAS, formation approach from N, departed E after 5 min.
